What entities are present on the cutting board and how are they positioned?
canonical_answer: Sliced red onions with purple and white rings are piled on the left side of the wooden cutting board. Whole white garlic bulbs are clustered in the center between the onions and peppers. Sliced green bell peppers forming bright green rings are piled on the right side. A small glass bowl containing yellow cooking oil sits above the garlic bulbs near the top. Dried bay leaves and peppercorns rest on the board surface.

canonical_answer: At 0s, sliced onions and peppers sit on a board with introductory text; at 4s, the text overlay remains visible over the ingredients; at 8s, a black screen displays the recipe title and chicken stock amount; at 18s, a man in a black polo stands behind a counter with raw meat.
